title: WINNER PICKS UP THE LAST MATCH

question.value: You pick up 1 through 6 of 30 matches. The second player picks up 1 through 6 matches, and so on. The player who picks up the last match wins. How do you get to pick up the last match?

answer.value: Again working backward, you win if you leave him 7 matches. If he picks up 1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6 matches, you pick up all the rest.
Before that, leave him 14 matches; before that, 21; and, before that, 28. Pick up 2 matches the first time.
